caption: A man with a short haircut and a full beard is positioned in a recording studio against a background of grey acoustic foam panels. He is wearing a white t-shirt with the text "Stay Positive" printed on the left side of his chest and large black over-ear headphones. He is speaking into a professional silver condenser microphone held by a black boom arm. Across the sequence, the man remains in the same position, though his facial expression shifts slightly as he speaks. He looks toward the left of the frame, his mouth moving as he communicates, and his eyes blinking. The equipment, including the microphone and the boom arm, remains stationary throughout the scene.
